item.title: evolve/provider/registry.ts uses 'llama3.2' instead of OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL constant
item.intent: The Ollama provider registry uses the same default model as all other Ollama callers. No inconsistent model name literals remain after BUG-033.
item.description: src/evolve/provider/registry.ts:42 hardcodes defaultModel: 'llama3.2' as a string literal. This is inconsistent with OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL = 'llama3:8b' defined in src/config/defaults.ts (added by BUG-033 sprint). The provider registry uses a different model name (llama3.2 vs llama3:8b) which means the default provider has a different model than the rest of the system. BUG-033 swept design/configure/ollama.ts, design/configure/smart.ts, design/configure/wizard.ts, web/server.tsx, evolve/migrate/extract.ts, evolve/memory/summarize.ts — but missed registry.ts. Steps: (1) verify OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL is exported from src/config/defaults.ts; (2) open src/evolve/provider/registry.ts; (3) add import { OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL } from '../../config/defaults.js'; (4) replace 'llama3.2' string literal on line 42 with OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL; (5) run evolve/ tests. Scope: 2 files, 2 lines changed. Zero logic change.
